name: FAOSTAT: World Census of Agriculture: Structural data from agricultural censuses
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Data from censuses of agriculture are collected at the holding level and provide information about the structure of agriculture of a country or a territory (e.g. size and number of holdings, land tenure, legal status, and sex of the holder). However, countries may apply their own definitions of agricultural holdings, which could affect the international comparability of census data.
